description: In this isotropic elastic (or just, elastic, for simplicity) model, strain increments generate stress increments according to the linear and reversible law of Hooke: (1) \[\Delta {\sigma}_{ij} = 2G\ \Delta {\epsilon}_{ij} + {\alpha}_2\ \Delta {\epsilon}_{kk}\ {\delta}_{ij}\] where the Einstein summation convention applies, \({\delta}_{ij}\) is the Kroenecker delta symbol, and \({\alpha}_2\) is a material constant related to the bulk modulus, \(K\) , and shear modulus, \(G\) , as (2) \[{\alpha}_2 = K - {{2}\over{3}}\ G\] New stress values are then obtained from the relation (3) \[{\sigma}_{ij}^

property_groups.name: Properties
property_groups.description: Material properties for the 'elastic' zone constitutive model. Assign the model with 'zone cmodel assign elastic [range ...]', then set these with 'zone property <keyword> <value> [range cmodel-name elastic]'.
